# Local classifier dependencies (CPU-only).
# Install alongside the base requirements:
#   pip install -r env/requirements.txt -r env/requirements-local-classifiers.txt

# Balanced random forest for ALeRCE-style LC classifier
imbalanced-learn>=0.12

# Optional: full ALeRCE feature extraction (~50+ features).
# If not installed, the local classifier uses the built-in 24 LC features.
# lc-classifier>=2.0
# turbofats>=1.0
# P4J>=1.0
